latest.title: Whales don't just sing they also whisper
latest.script_key: this whale just whispered to its buddy watch how it barely moves its mouth just a slow ripple along its throat whales talk underwater without big splashes because sound travels four times faster than in air that s why they can pass secrets across miles did you ever learn whales only sing loud songs

latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next
